flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Oregon Community College fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (16.2% → 13.5%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Central Oregon Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.1k → $13.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Oregon Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Oregon Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
